"C:\Program Files (x86)\winlibs-x86_64-posix-seh-gcc-15.2.0-mingw-w64msvcrt-13.0.0-r1\mingw64\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\tearing.dir/objects.a
C:\PROGRA~2\WINLIB~1.0-R\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\tearing.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\tearing.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\PROGRA~2\WINLIB~1.0-R\mingw64\bin\gcc.exe -g -mwindows -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\tearing.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o tearing.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libtearing.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\tearing.dir\linkLibs.rsp
